\scriptscriptstyle\frac{⟨24⟩(1/3⟨14⟩²[13][14]-1/3⟨24⟩⟨34⟩[23][34])}{⟨12⟩[24]⟨34⟩⟨4|1+2|4]} +\\
\scriptscriptstyle\frac{1/3⟨24⟩²[34]⟨4|1+3|2]s_{124}s_{134}}{⟨12⟩[24]⟨34⟩⟨4|1+2|4](⟨1|4|𝟓|2|1]-⟨4|3|𝟓|2|4])} \phantom{+}
\end{gathered}$
\end{my}
